allow: Bash(New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path config, apps\\dashboard, core\\ingestion, core\\transform, core\\gold, data\\bronze, data\\silver, data\\gold, static, templates, tests, docs)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\M1578465\\Projetos\\painel_de_convenios"; Start-Process -FilePath ".\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "manage.py runserver --noreload" -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000" -TimeoutSec 5; "HTTP $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { $_.Exception.Message })

PowerShell($proc = Start-Process -FilePath "C:\\Users\\M1578465\\Projetos\\painel_de_convenios\\.venv\\Scripts\\python.exe" -ArgumentList "manage.py runserver --settings=config.settings.dev 8000" -WorkingDirectory "C:\\Users\\M1578465\\Projetos\\painel_de_convenios" -PassThru -WindowStyle Hidden; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3; try { $resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://127.0.0.1:8000/" -TimeoutSec 5 -UseBasicParsing; "HTTP $\($resp.StatusCode\) - Content length: $\($resp.Content.Length\)" } catch { "Error: $_" }; $proc.Id)
PowerShell(Get-Process -Name python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Id -eq 9684 } | Stop-Process -Force; "Servidor encerrado")
